name: harlequin, jester, pierrot// The Freak Circus
description:
performer version of that other bot I made with different scenarios so here you go chat!!

not recommended to use a canon character from the actual tfc universe, rather an oc or better, because of the fact pierrot, harlequin, and jester will have a liking TO said character, but it isn't specified in-chat, so if your oc hates harlequin and harlequin hates them, you can attempt to do that!!

I think... I think I'll be making way more bots now almost everyday during night hours so us... expect stuff to wake up to during night?

there could be smut bots coming idek(I don't exactly know)

I want pavlova and millennial tree that might be made this same night chat I feel MOTO-VATED/ref!!

1/19/2026; OH MY FUCKING GOD WE'RE ON PAGE 1 ON THE FREAK CIRCUS BOTS GUYS this bot might get an update to be better then...
creator: Hooray!!
